testcase.name: test_generate_outfits_returns_aesthetic_score_and_suggestions

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 assert 502 in [200, 500] + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_fitai_v4.py:83: in test_generate_outfits_returns_aesthetic_score_and_suggestions assert response.status_code in [200, 500], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 502 E assert 502 in [200, 500] E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
